name: Water Tank Size Calculator
seo_description: Water Tank Size Calculator. Number of people, Litres per person/day, Days of autonomy — get Litres needed, Recommended tank, Daily consumption instantly.
example_label: Calculate water tank capacity for 4 people with 150L/day consumption and 3 days reserve.

range_hints.dias_autonomia: Recommended: 1-3 days depending on supply frequency

result_context: For {personas} people at {litros_persona_dia} L/day with {dias_autonomia} days: {litros_necesarios} L tank, {deposito_recomendado_L} L recommended ({m3_dia} m3/day).
formula_display: Daily = People x L/person; Capacity = Daily x Days
steps: Calculate daily use: 4 people x 150 L = 600 L/day
Calculate capacity: 600 L/day x 3 days = 1800 L
Add dead volume: +10% = 1980 L (commercial tank: 2000 L)
mistakes: Not accounting for dead volume at bottom of tank
Sizing without margin for visitors or exceptional consumption
Not planning overflow and cleaning system for the tank
description: Water tank sizing based on occupants, daily consumption and reserve days.
